# EXECUTION-SPEC EXEC-080
# Generated by build-pipeline via lead-architect (scaffold) + domain expert consultation
# PRD: docs/10-prd/PRD-080-financial-telemetry-pre-wave2-surface-debt-closure-v0.md

prd: PRD-080
prd_title: "Financial Telemetry — Pre-Wave-2 Surface Debt Closure"
service: PlayerFinancialService / MTLService / RatingSlipModalService
mvp_phase: 1

# Intake Authority Chain
# No FIB-S — PRD-only mode. All decisions frozen in ADR-052/053/054/055 and Wave 1 dispositions.
fib_h: ~
fib_s: ~

# GOV-010 waiver: bounded debt-closure slice; initiation directive + dispositions serve as scaffold;
# ADR-052/053/054/055 are the frozen decision anchors.

workstreams:
  WS1:
    name: Inventory and Classification Lock
    description: >
      Verify consumer callsite counts match PRE-WAVE-2-SURFACE-DEBT-INVENTORY.md.
      Lock A/B/C/D dispositions from PRE-WAVE-2-SURFACE-DEBT-DISPOSITIONS.md.
      Resolve OQ-1 and OQ-2 (see decisions below). No code changes. Block if
      counts diverge from inventory before implementation begins.
    executor: lead-architect
    executor_type: skill
    depends_on: []
    outputs:
      - docs/21-exec-spec/EXEC-080-financial-telemetry-pre-wave2-surface-debt-closure.md  # this document, with decisions populated
    gate: gate-2-validation
    estimated_complexity: low

  WS2:
    name: VisitFinancialSummaryDTO FinancialValue Wrap
    description: >
      Wrap VisitFinancialSummaryDTO.total_in/total_out/net_amount as FinancialValue
      (type 'actual', source 'PFT', completeness.status 'unknown' default).
      Update toVisitFinancialSummaryDTO mapper and all 11 named consumer callsites.
    executor: backend-service-builder
    executor_type: skill
    depends_on: [WS1]
    outputs:
      - services/player-financial/dtos.ts
      - services/player-financial/mappers.ts
      - services/player-financial/__tests__/mappers.test.ts
      - hooks/mtl/use-patron-daily-total.ts
      - components/mtl/gaming-day-summary.tsx
      - app/(dashboard)/players/[playerId]/timeline/_components/compliance-panel-wrapper.tsx
      - services/player360-dashboard/mappers.ts
    gate: type-check
    estimated_complexity: medium

  WS3:
    name: FinancialSectionDTO Pass-Through and Modal-Data Route Update
    description: >
      Change FinancialSectionDTO.totalCashIn/totalCashOut/netPosition from number to FinancialValue.
      Update modal-data route to pass through value/type/source unchanged from VisitFinancialSummaryDTO
      and set completeness.status from normalized visit lifecycle only. Current code derives
      lifecycle from VisitDTO.ended_at: null → partial, non-null → complete,
      absent/ambiguous → unknown.
    executor: backend-service-builder
    executor_type: skill
    depends_on: [WS2]
    outputs:
      - services/rating-slip-modal/dtos.ts
      - app/api/v1/rating-slips/[id]/modal-data/route.ts
      - services/rating-slip-modal/rpc.ts
    gate: type-check
    estimated_complexity: low

  WS3b:
    name: Rating Slip Modal UI Rendering Update
    description: >
      Update rating-slip-modal.tsx and form-section-cash-in.tsx to consume FinancialValue.
      Remove /100 conversions and toFixed(2) calls. Render formatCents(field.value),
      authority label (type), and completeness badge (completeness.status).
      computedChipsOut and computedNetPosition remain bare number (F-7).
    executor: frontend-design-pt-2
    executor_type: skill
    depends_on: [WS3]
    outputs:
      - components/modals/rating-slip/rating-slip-modal.tsx
      - components/modals/rating-slip/form-section-cash-in.tsx
    gate: type-check
    estimated_complexity: low

  WS4:
    name: MtlEntryDTO.amount FinancialValue Wrap
    description: >
      Wrap MtlEntryDTO.amount as FinancialValue (type 'compliance', source 'mtl_entry',
      completeness.status 'complete' per row). Update mapMtlEntryRow mapper and all 13
      named consumer callsites across 6 files. MtlEntryWithNotesDTO inherits via extension.
      Compliance isolation verification is observational only; violations are recorded
      for post-Wave-2 remediation and are not fixed in this slice.
    executor: backend-service-builder
    executor_type: skill
    depends_on: [WS1]
    outputs:
      - services/mtl/dtos.ts
      - services/mtl/mappers.ts
      - services/mtl/__tests__/mappers.test.ts
      - components/mtl/entry-list.tsx
      - components/mtl/entry-detail.tsx
      - components/mtl/mtl-entry-form.tsx
      - components/mtl/mtl-entry-view-modal.tsx
      - components/mtl/compliance-dashboard.tsx
    gate: type-check
    estimated_complexity: medium
    # WS1 correction: app/review/mtl-form/mtl-entry-form.tsx does not exist — removed from outputs.

  WS5:
    name: MtlGamingDaySummaryDTO Aggregate Fields Wrap
    description: >
      Wrap total_in/total_out/total_volume as FinancialValue and max_single_in/max_single_out
      as FinancialValue | null (type 'compliance', source 'mtl_entry', completeness.status 'unknown'
      always — DEC-1 resolution: view has no gaming-day close status).
      deriveAggBadge called on bare numbers before wrapping. Update named consumers.
    executor: backend-service-builder
    executor_type: skill
    depends_on: [WS4]
    outputs:
      - services/mtl/dtos.ts
      - services/mtl/mappers.ts
      - services/mtl/__tests__/mappers.test.ts
      - components/mtl/gaming-day-summary.tsx
      - components/mtl/compliance-dashboard.tsx
      - hooks/mtl/use-patron-daily-total.ts
    gate: type-check
    estimated_complexity: medium

  WS6:
    name: OpenAPI and Route-Boundary Test Alignment
    description: >
      Update api-surface.openapi.yaml: replace bare-number total_in/total_out/net_amount
      on financial-summary route and totalCashIn/totalCashOut/netPosition on modal-data route
      with allOf + $ref FinancialValue. Remove DEFERRED annotations.
      Create financial-summary route test (does not exist). Update modal-data route test.
      Add minimal F-11 compliance isolation guardrail test.
    executor: api-builder
    executor_type: skill
    depends_on: [WS2, WS3]
    outputs:
      - docs/25-api-data/api-surface.openapi.yaml
      - app/api/v1/visits/[visitId]/financial-summary/__tests__/route.test.ts
      - app/api/v1/rating-slips/[id]/modal-data/__tests__/route.test.ts
    gate: schema-validation
    estimated_complexity: medium

  WS7:
    name: Rollout Tracker Closure and Wave 2 Prerequisite Update
    description: >
      Update ROLLOUT-TRACKER.json: mark all 12 pre-Wave-2 surface debt fields closed.
      Update cursor.next_action to Wave 2 entry criteria check.
      Add Wave 2 completeness-refinement note: standalone /financial-summary emits
      'unknown' — Wave 2 must introduce lifecycle-aware projection infrastructure.
    executor: lead-architect
    executor_type: skill
    depends_on: [WS2, WS3, WS3b, WS4, WS5, WS6]
    outputs:
      - docs/issues/gaps/financial-data-distribution-standard/actions/ROLLOUT-TRACKER.json
    gate: build
    estimated_complexity: low

# Execution Phases
execution_phases:
  - name: Phase 1 — Classification Lock
    parallel: [WS1]
    gates: [gate-2-validation]

  - name: Phase 2 — Service Wraps (parallel, different bounded contexts)
    parallel: [WS2, WS4]
    gates: [type-check]

  - name: "Phase 3 — Dependent Wraps (WS3 after WS2; WS5 after WS4)"
    parallel: [WS3, WS5]
    gates: [type-check]

  - name: Phase 4 — UI and Transport (parallel, orthogonal concerns)
    parallel: [WS3b, WS6]
    gates: [type-check, schema-validation]

  - name: Phase 5 — Terminal Closure
    parallel: [WS7]
    gates: [build]

# Validation Gates
gates:
  gate-2-validation:
    command: "# Manual review: confirm consumer counts match inventory; OQ-1/OQ-2 resolved (see decisions)"
    success_criteria: "Consumer counts verified; dispositions signed off; no outstanding open questions"

  type-check:
    command: npm run type-check
    success_criteria: "Exit code 0; no TypeScript errors in any modified file; no /100, toFixed, or bare FinancialValue in arithmetic at render sites"

  schema-validation:
    command: "npx js-yaml docs/25-api-data/api-surface.openapi.yaml > /dev/null && npm run test:ci -- --testPathPatterns='financial-summary|modal-data' > /tmp/ws6-tests.log 2>&1"
    success_criteria: "OpenAPI YAML valid; total_in/total_out/net_amount and totalCashIn/totalCashOut/netPosition reference FinancialValue schema; all route-boundary tests pass; F-11 compliance isolation test passes"

  build:
    command: "# Manual check: ROLLOUT-TRACKER.json cursor.next_action updated; 12 fields marked closed"
    success_criteria: "All 12 pre-Wave-2 fields closed; cursor.next_action points to Wave 2 entry; npm run build exits 0"

# Open-Question Decisions
decisions:
  - decision_id: DEC-1
    resolves_open_question: OQ-1
    decision_statement: >
      MtlGamingDaySummaryDTO aggregate fields emit completeness.status 'unknown' always.
      The mtl_gaming_day_summary view (database.types.ts) has no gaming-day close status
      column (no closed_at, is_closed, or day_status on the view Row type). The mapper
      cannot determine gaming-day lifecycle without a schema change. 'unknown' is the
      correct honest default per PRD-080 F-5 and the inventory Option A recommendation.
    rationale: "View confirmed via database.types.ts inspection — no gaming-day lifecycle field present."
    impact_on_scope: none
    wave_2_note: >
      Wave 2 MUST introduce gaming-day lifecycle awareness so these fields can emit
      'partial'/'complete'. Record in WAVE-2-PREP-DECISIONS.md at WS7 closure.
    verification: assertion  # WS5 test asserts completeness.status === 'unknown' on all 5 fields

  - decision_id: DEC-2
    resolves_open_question: OQ-2
    decision_statement: >
      MtlGamingDaySummaryDTO.max_single_in and max_single_out emit null (not FinancialValue
      with unknown completeness) when no transactions of that direction exist on the gaming day.
      null means 'not applicable' — no transactions — which is distinct from unknown completeness.
      Consumers must null-check before accessing .value.
    rationale: "Null and unknown are semantically distinct states per PRD-080 OQ-2."
    impact_on_scope: none
    verification: assertion  # WS5 test asserts null case emits null, not FinancialValue

# Risks and Mitigations
risks:
  - risk: "MTL consumer blast radius (13+ callsites across 6 files) causes unexpected compile errors"
    likelihood: medium
    impact: low-medium
    mitigation: "Enumerate all callsites before starting WS4; compile-check after each file; WS1 inventory lock confirms counts"

  - risk: "Player360 dashboard mappers use arithmetic on .total_in/.net_amount — these become object references after WS2"
    likelihood: medium
    impact: medium
    mitigation: "services/player360-dashboard/mappers.ts is a named consumer in WS2 scope; update to .total_in.value before arithmetic"

  - risk: "WS4 and WS5 both edit services/mtl/dtos.ts — file conflict if parallel"
    likelihood: certain
    impact: low
    mitigation: "WS5 depends_on WS4; strictly sequential in Phase 3"

  - risk: "Scope creep into FinancialTransactionDTO.amount"
    likelihood: medium
    impact: medium
    mitigation: "That field is a separate deferral with cashier domain blast radius. Block if proposed during implementation."

  - risk: "max_single_in/out render callsites not found in surface grep — may be more than zero"
    likelihood: low
    impact: low
    mitigation: "WS5 executor may grep during implementation. If additional callsites are found, record them in POST-WAVE-2-SURFACE-DEBT.md and proceed only with inventory-defined callsites."

external_dependencies:
  - prd: PRD-070
    service: PlayerFinancialService
    required_for: "financialValueSchema at @/lib/financial/schema — already delivered"
  - prd: PRD-074
    service: RatingSlipService
    required_for: "FinancialValue canonical type at types/financial.ts — already delivered"
  - prd: PRD-079
    service: Wave 1 Phase 1.5 sign-off
    required_for: "Wave 1 closure prerequisite — complete as of 2026-05-06"

---

# EXECUTION-SPEC: EXEC-080 — Financial Telemetry Pre-Wave-2 Surface Debt Closure

## Overview

PRD-080 closes 12 bare-number currency fields that were deliberately deferred from Wave 1 (Phase 1.5). These are the "cut surfaces" — not bugs, but a deliberate pre-production deferral that becomes a blocking prerequisite before Wave 2 schema and outbox implementation begins.

No field exits this EXEC-SPEC as an unclassified bare-number currency value. No schema changes. No new tables. No migrations. No new routes. This is a bounded semantic surface closure.

**Wave 2 entry is blocked until this EXEC-SPEC completes.**

### Scope Containment Rule

This EXEC-SPEC is a bounded closure slice.

The following are strictly prohibited during execution:

- expanding field scope beyond the 12 enumerated fields
- modifying additional DTOs, routes, or consumers not listed in WS outputs
- performing opportunistic refactors (UI, service, or schema)
- introducing shared abstractions or utilities not required for direct completion
- fixing adjacent or discovered issues outside defined scope

If additional issues or callsites are discovered:

- they must be recorded
- they must NOT be addressed within this PRD

Violation of this rule constitutes scope breach.

## Scope

**In scope — 12 fields across 4 DTOs:**
- `VisitFinancialSummaryDTO.total_in / total_out / net_amount` (Group A — 3 fields)
- `FinancialSectionDTO.totalCashIn / totalCashOut / netPosition` (Group B — 3 fields, pass-through from Group A)
- `MtlEntryDTO.amount` (Group C — 1 field)
- `MtlGamingDaySummaryDTO.total_in / total_out / max_single_in / max_single_out / total_volume` (Group D — 5 fields)

**Explicitly out of scope:**
- `FinancialTransactionDTO.amount` — separate deferral, different blast radius
- `CreateMtlEntryInput.amount` and `CreateFinancialTxnInput.amount` — §6.1 operator-input carve-outs
- Wave 2 outbox, dual-layer authoring, or projection work
- Any field not listed above, even if adjacent

## Architecture Context

- **`financialValueSchema`** lives at `@/lib/financial/schema` (shared library). Do NOT create per-service copies.
- **Wrapping pattern**: follow `toVisitCashInWithAdjustmentsDTO` in `services/player-financial/mappers.ts` — call `financialValueSchema.parse({value, type, source, completeness})` at the mapper boundary.
- **Badge computation**: `deriveEntryBadge` and `deriveAggBadge` take bare `number` — call these BEFORE wrapping.
- **DEC-1**: `mtl_gaming_day_summary` view has no gaming-day close status → `completeness.status: 'unknown'` always for all MtlGamingDaySummaryDTO aggregate fields.
- **Modal projection invariant (§4B)**: the modal-data route may ONLY override `completeness.status`. It MUST NOT modify `value`, `type`, or `source`.
- **Compliance isolation (F-11)**: `type: 'compliance'` values must never be aggregated with `type: 'actual'` values. After wrapping, this is type-enforced, not convention-enforced.
- **Boundary protection**: every FinancialValue emitted through API responses and DTO serialization boundaries MUST include `value`, `type`, `source`, and `completeness.status`. Optional logs/debug payloads modified during this slice MUST preserve full FinancialValue structure if emitted.

## Surface Classification (ADR-041)

EXEC-080 modifies existing truth-bearing financial surfaces only.

No new delivery architecture, rendering mode, route topology, or aggregation class is introduced in this slice.

Surface classifications remain:

- Rating slip modal → existing modal/BFF surface
- Visit financial-summary → existing API contract surface
- MTL surfaces → existing compliance client surfaces

ADR-041 applies only as provenance guidance for existing surfaces, not as a basis for introducing new architectural patterns within this EXEC-SPEC.

## Workstream Details

### WS1: Inventory and Classification Lock

**Purpose**: No-code prerequisite. Verify the implementation state matches the inventory before any code changes.

**Deliverables**:
1. Confirm consumer callsite counts: `total_in` (5 callsites), `total_out` (4), `net_amount` (2), `MtlEntryDTO.amount` (13 across 6 files), `MtlGamingDaySummaryDTO` consumers (named in inventory)
2. Use read-only grep to verify inventory-listed `max_single_in/out` render callsites; any additional callsites are handled under Discovery containment
3. Lock dispositions: Groups A, B → Disposition A; Groups C, D → Disposition D
4. Record DEC-1 and DEC-2 in this document (already recorded above)

**Discovery containment**:

During implementation, grep may be used to detect additional callsites.

If additional callsites are discovered:

- DO NOT update them within this PRD
- DO NOT expand the workstream scope
- Record them in `POST-WAVE-2-SURFACE-DEBT.md`
- Proceed with implementation using only inventory-defined callsites

This PRD is a closure slice, not a discovery phase.

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- [ ] Consumer counts verified or discrepancy reported to lead-architect before proceeding
- [ ] All 12 fields have confirmed A or D disposition
- [ ] No outstanding open questions

---

### WS2: VisitFinancialSummaryDTO FinancialValue Wrap

**Purpose**: Wrap the three visit financial summary fields as canonical `FinancialValue` at the service-layer outbound boundary.

**Deliverables**:
1. `services/player-financial/dtos.ts` — change `total_in/total_out/net_amount` from `number` to `FinancialValue`; remove DEFERRED annotation; add PRD-080 classification annotation
2. `services/player-financial/mappers.ts` — update `toVisitFinancialSummaryDTO` using `financialValueSchema.parse(...)` pattern (follow `toVisitCashInWithAdjustmentsDTO` at line 167 in same file). Emit `completeness.status: 'unknown'` always — visit lifecycle not available at mapper level.
3. Update all 11 named consumer callsites to read `.field.value` before arithmetic or display

**Classification**: `type: 'actual'`, `source: 'PFT'`, `completeness.status: 'unknown'` (default; modal-data BFF overrides in WS3)

**Consumer callsite changes**:
- `app/api/v1/rating-slips/[id]/modal-data/route.ts:303,304,305` — pass-through; WS3 owns this update
- `hooks/mtl/use-patron-daily-total.ts:125,126` — `.total_in` → `.total_in.value`, `.total_out` → `.total_out.value`
- `components/mtl/gaming-day-summary.tsx:272,288` — unwrap `.value` before `formatCents()`
- `app/(dashboard)/players/[playerId]/timeline/_components/compliance-panel-wrapper.tsx:43` — unwrap `.value`
- `services/player360-dashboard/mappers.ts` — unwrap `.total_in.value`, `.total_out.value`, `.net_amount.value` before arithmetic

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- [ ] `VisitFinancialSummaryDTO.total_in/total_out/net_amount` are `FinancialValue` in dtos.ts
- [ ] `toVisitFinancialSummaryDTO` emits `completeness.status: 'unknown'` on all three fields
- [ ] `financialValueSchema.parse()` validates each field at mapper boundary
- [ ] All named consumer callsites unwrap via `.value` before arithmetic
- [ ] Mapper tests updated: assert `FinancialValue` shape, `type === 'actual'`, `source === 'PFT'`, `completeness.status === 'unknown'`
- [ ] `npm run type-check` exits 0
- [ ] No `as any`

---

### WS3: FinancialSectionDTO Pass-Through and Modal-Data Route Update

**Purpose**: Update the BFF projection layer. FinancialSectionDTO fields become FinancialValue pass-throughs. The modal-data route and RPC wrapper are the only modal-data layers with visit lifecycle context and are the only places that override `completeness.status`.

**Deliverables**:
1. `services/rating-slip-modal/dtos.ts` — change `FinancialSectionDTO.totalCashIn/totalCashOut/netPosition` from `number` to `FinancialValue`
2. `app/api/v1/rating-slips/[id]/modal-data/route.ts` — update lines 302–306 financial section construction:
   - Pass through `value`, `type`, `source` unchanged from `VisitFinancialSummaryDTO`
   - Derive `completeness.status` from normalized visit lifecycle only. Current code derives lifecycle from `VisitDTO.ended_at`: `null` → `'partial'`, non-null ISO timestamp → `'complete'`, absent or ambiguous → `'unknown'`
   - Apply `financialValueSchema.parse()` at route outbound boundary
3. `services/rating-slip-modal/rpc.ts` — update RPC response validation and mapping so the RPC-enabled path emits the same FinancialValue shape as the legacy path. No modal-data path may emit bare `financial.totalCashIn/totalCashOut/netPosition`.

**Projection constraint (PRD-080 §4B — hard rule)**:
> The route MAY: pass through `value/type/source`, override `completeness.status`.
> The route MUST NOT: modify `value`, modify `type` or `source`, recompute financial authority.

**Completeness derivation source**:

Completeness override MUST derive from normalized visit lifecycle only.

Rules:

- Current `VisitDTO` does not expose a `status` field; lifecycle is derived from `ended_at` in this slice.
- `ended_at === null` maps to `'partial'`.
- `ended_at` with a valid timestamp maps to `'complete'`.
- Missing, invalid, or unavailable visit lifecycle maps to `'unknown'`.
- The modal-data route and RPC wrapper may access slip state only as a proxy for visit lifecycle.
- Slip status MUST NOT be treated as an independent lifecycle authority.
- No derivation from transaction timestamps, transaction counts, render time, or UI state.

Any ambiguity must resolve to `'unknown'`, not inferred states.

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- [ ] `FinancialSectionDTO.totalCashIn/totalCashOut/netPosition` are `FinancialValue` in dtos.ts
- [ ] Modal-data route passes `value/type/source` through unchanged
- [ ] `completeness.status` is derived from normalized visit lifecycle only: `ended_at === null` → `'partial'`, valid `ended_at` → `'complete'`, unavailable/ambiguous → `'unknown'`
- [ ] `financialValueSchema.parse()` validates all three fields at route boundary
- [ ] RPC-enabled modal-data path emits `FinancialValue` for `financial.totalCashIn/totalCashOut/netPosition`
- [ ] Legacy modal-data path emits `FinancialValue` for `financial.totalCashIn/totalCashOut/netPosition`
- [ ] `npm run type-check` exits 0 (both WS2 and WS3 changes)
- [ ] No modification to `value/type/source` in route handler

---

### WS3b: Rating Slip Modal UI Rendering Update

**Purpose**: Update the UI layer to consume `FinancialValue` objects. Remove bare-number patterns. Add authority and completeness labels per NF-6.

**Deliverables**:
1. `components/modals/rating-slip/rating-slip-modal.tsx` — 5 callsite updates (lines 554, 560, 564, 718, 921)
2. `components/modals/rating-slip/form-section-cash-in.tsx` — 2 callsite updates (lines 24, 119)

**Callsite-by-callsite changes**:
- `line 554`: `const totalCashIn = modalData.financial.totalCashIn` (FinancialValue object, no `/100`)
- `line 560`: `(modalData.financial.totalCashOut.value + pendingChipsTaken * 100)` → `computedChipsOut` remains bare cents
- `line 564`: access `modalData.financial.netPosition.value` if wire value referenced
- `line 718`: `formatCents(totalCashIn.value)` + authority label + completeness badge
- `line 921`: prop passed as `FinancialValue` (not bare number)
- `form-section-cash-in.tsx:24`: prop type `totalCashIn?: FinancialValue`
- `form-section-cash-in.tsx:119`: `formatCents(totalCashIn.value)` + authority and completeness labels

**Badge styling (PT-2 Visual DNA)**:
- `'partial'` → `bg-amber-500/10 text-amber-400 border-amber-500/30`
- `'complete'` → `bg-green-500/10 text-green-400 border-green-500/30`
- `'unknown'` → `bg-muted text-muted-foreground border-border/50`

**Invariants**:
- `computedChipsOut` and `computedNetPosition` remain bare `number` — do NOT wrap (F-7)
- No `FinancialValue` constructed client-side
- UI updates are strictly limited to the named consumer callsites in this workstream.
- No shared component refactors are allowed.
- No global formatting utilities may be introduced or modified.
- No additional render sites may be updated even if discovered.
- Any additional usage of affected fields must be deferred and recorded for a separate slice.

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- [ ] No `/100` or `.toFixed(2)` on any wrapped FinancialValue field at render sites
- [ ] `formatCents(field.value)` used at all six display callsites
- [ ] Authority label (`type`, capitalized) visible at all financial display sites
- [ ] Completeness badge (`completeness.status`) visible with correct color
- [ ] `form-section-cash-in.tsx` prop type is `FinancialValue`, not `number`
- [ ] `computedChipsOut` and `computedNetPosition` remain bare `number`
- [ ] `npm run type-check` exits 0; no `as any`

---

### WS4: MtlEntryDTO.amount FinancialValue Wrap

**Purpose**: Wrap MTL entry amount as compliance-class FinancialValue. Update mapper and all 13 named consumer callsites.

**Deliverables**:
1. `services/mtl/dtos.ts` — `MtlEntryDTO.amount`: `number` → `FinancialValue`
2. `services/mtl/mappers.ts` — update `mapMtlEntryRow`: call `deriveEntryBadge(row.amount, thresholds)` first (bare number), then wrap `amount`
3. 6 consumer files updated (13 callsites total)
4. F-11 enforcement test added to `services/mtl/__tests__/mappers.test.ts`

**Classification**: `type: 'compliance'`, `source: 'mtl_entry'`, `completeness.status: 'complete'` (per row — individual MTL entry is always a committed complete transaction)

**Note**: `MtlEntryWithNotesDTO extends MtlEntryDTO` — inherits wrapped `amount` automatically, no separate change needed.

**Compliance isolation verification**:

Compliance isolation verification is observational only.

If co-aggregation of `type: 'compliance'` and `type: 'actual'` values is discovered:

- DO NOT fix within this PRD
- Record as violation in `COMPLIANCE-ISOLATION-VIOLATIONS.md`
- Escalate to a dedicated post-Wave-2 remediation slice

No UI restructuring or aggregation changes are in scope.

**Consumer callsites**:

| File | Lines | Change |
|---|---|---|
| `components/mtl/entry-list.tsx` | 229 | `.amount` → `.amount.value` + compliance label |
| `components/mtl/entry-detail.tsx` | 168 | `.amount` → `.amount.value` + compliance label |
| `components/mtl/mtl-entry-form.tsx` | 460,462,547,679,681 | `.amount` → `.amount.value` |
| `components/mtl/mtl-entry-view-modal.tsx` | 226,228,306,429,431 | `.amount` → `.amount.value` |
| `components/mtl/compliance-dashboard.tsx` | 386 | `.amount` → `.amount.value` + compliance label |
| `app/review/mtl-form/mtl-entry-form.tsx` | 515,517,611,756,758 | `.amount` → `.amount.value` |

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- [ ] `MtlEntryDTO.amount` is `FinancialValue` with `type: 'compliance'`, `source: 'mtl_entry'`, `completeness.status: 'complete'`
- [ ] `mapMtlEntryRow` calls `deriveEntryBadge(row.amount, thresholds)` before wrapping — badge computed from bare cents
- [ ] All 13 callsites unwrap `.amount.value` before `formatCents()` or arithmetic
- [ ] Compliance isolation verification completed observationally; any violation recorded in `COMPLIANCE-ISOLATION-VIOLATIONS.md`
- [ ] F-11 test asserts compliance-class fields emit `type === 'compliance'` and are not labeled or treated as `actual`
- [ ] `npm run type-check` exits 0; no `as any`

### WS5: MtlGamingDaySummaryDTO Aggregate Fields Wrap

**Purpose**: Wrap five gaming-day aggregate fields as compliance-class FinancialValue (or null). OQ-1 resolved by DEC-1: view has no close status → always `'unknown'`.

**Deliverables**:
1. `services/mtl/dtos.ts` (edit after WS4) — 5 field type changes
2. `services/mtl/mappers.ts` — update `mapGamingDaySummaryRow`
3. 3 named consumer files updated

**Classification**:
- `total_in/total_out/total_volume`: `type: 'compliance'`, `source: 'mtl_entry'`, `completeness.status: 'unknown'` (DEC-1)
- `max_single_in/max_single_out`: `FinancialValue | null` — `null` when no transactions of that direction (DEC-2)

**Mapper implementation note**:
```
// Correct order — badges use bare numbers:
const totalIn = row.total_in ?? 0;
const totalOut = row.total_out ?? 0;
const agg_badge_in = deriveAggBadge(totalIn, thresholds);   // bare number
const agg_badge_out = deriveAggBadge(totalOut, thresholds); // bare number
// Then wrap:
total_in: financialValueSchema.parse({ value: totalIn, type: 'compliance', source: 'mtl_entry', completeness: { status: 'unknown' } })
// null fields:
max_single_in: row.max_single_in === null ? null : financialValueSchema.parse({ value: row.max_single_in, ... })
```

**Consumer callsites**:
- `components/mtl/gaming-day-summary.tsx:272,288` — `.total_in.value`, `.total_out.value` + completeness badge
- `components/mtl/compliance-dashboard.tsx:132` — `.value` unwrap + compliance label
- `hooks/mtl/use-patron-daily-total.ts:125,126` — `.total_in.value`, `.total_out.value` for arithmetic

**Discovery containment**:

During implementation, grep may be used to detect additional callsites.

If additional callsites are discovered:

- DO NOT update them within this PRD
- DO NOT expand the workstream scope
- Record them in `POST-WAVE-2-SURFACE-DEBT.md`
- Proceed with implementation using only inventory-defined callsites

This PRD is a closure slice, not a discovery phase.

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- [ ] `total_in/total_out/total_volume` are `FinancialValue`; `max_single_in/max_single_out` are `FinancialValue | null`
- [ ] All five fields: `type === 'compliance'`, `source === 'mtl_entry'`, `completeness.status === 'unknown'`
- [ ] `mapGamingDaySummaryRow`: `deriveAggBadge` called before wrapping; badges remain correct
- [ ] `null` for `max_single_in/out` → `null` emitted (not `FinancialValue` with unknown)
- [ ] Named consumer callsites unwrap `.value`; `null` checked before `.value` access
- [ ] `services/mtl/__tests__/mappers.test.ts` updated: assert all 5 fields FinancialValue shape; assert null case
- [ ] Wave 2 note added to WAVE-2-PREP-DECISIONS.md per DEC-1 at WS7 (or noted in WS7 tracker update)
- [ ] `npm run type-check` exits 0; no `as any`

### WS6: OpenAPI and Route-Boundary Test Alignment

**Purpose**: Update the OpenAPI contract for both affected routes and add/update route-boundary tests. Create the missing financial-summary test file.

**Deliverables**:
1. `docs/25-api-data/api-surface.openapi.yaml` — two route path entry updates
2. `app/api/v1/visits/[visitId]/financial-summary/__tests__/route.test.ts` — **CREATE** (does not exist)
3. `app/api/v1/rating-slips/[id]/modal-data/__tests__/route.test.ts` — **UPDATE** (exists)
4. `services/rating-slip-modal/rpc.ts` — **UPDATE** if RPC response validation/mapping still expects bare financial numbers

**OpenAPI changes**:

Route 1: `GET /api/v1/visits/{visit_id}/financial-summary`
- Replace `total_in/total_out/net_amount`: `{type: number, description: '... DEFERRED Phase 1.2.'}` with `allOf: [{$ref: '#/components/schemas/FinancialValue'}]` and PRD-080 closure description
- Remove all DEFERRED annotations from these fields

Route 2: `GET /api/v1/rating-slips/{id}/modal-data` — find `FinancialSectionDTO` inline schema:
- Replace `totalCashIn/totalCashOut/netPosition`: `{type: number}` with `allOf: [{$ref: '#/components/schemas/FinancialValue'}]`
- No dual representation: bare-number variant must not coexist with FinancialValue for same field

**Test requirements**:

*financial-summary (new test)*:
- Mock `PlayerFinancialService` returning `VisitFinancialSummaryDTO` with FinancialValue fields
- Assert `data.total_in`, `data.total_out`, `data.net_amount` all have `value`, `type`, `source`, `completeness.status`
- Assert `type === 'actual'`, `source === 'PFT'`, `completeness.status === 'unknown'`
- Use `financialValueSchema` from `@/lib/financial/schema` for parse assertion

*modal-data (update existing)*:
- Update mock at line 96: `financial: { totalCashIn: {value: 0, type: 'actual', source: 'PFT', completeness: {status: 'unknown'}}, ... }`
- Update assertion at line 119 to check FinancialValue shape on financial fields
- Add explicit coverage for both modal-data execution paths:
  - RPC path: `NEXT_PUBLIC_USE_MODAL_BFF_RPC=true`; assert `financial.totalCashIn/totalCashOut/netPosition` are FinancialValue and contain no bare-number duplicate.
  - Legacy path: `NEXT_PUBLIC_USE_MODAL_BFF_RPC=false`; assert the same FinancialValue shape.
- Add lifecycle cases for modal-data completeness:
  - `VisitDTO.ended_at === null` → `completeness.status === 'partial'`
  - valid `VisitDTO.ended_at` → `completeness.status === 'complete'`
  - unavailable/ambiguous lifecycle → `completeness.status === 'unknown'`

*F-11 compliance isolation test (minimal, non-expansive)*:
- Assert that compliance-class fields emit `type: 'compliance'`
- Assert they are not labeled or treated as `actual`

The test MUST NOT:

- introduce shared validation utilities
- attempt arithmetic validation across types
- introduce abstraction layers or helpers

This is a guardrail, not a validation framework.

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- [ ] OpenAPI `financial-summary` path entry: `total_in/total_out/net_amount` reference `$ref: '#/components/schemas/FinancialValue'`; DEFERRED annotation removed
- [ ] OpenAPI `modal-data` path entry: `financial.totalCashIn/totalCashOut/netPosition` reference `$ref: '#/components/schemas/FinancialValue'`
- [ ] No bare-number field coexists with FinancialValue for same value in either path entry
- [ ] `npx js-yaml docs/25-api-data/api-surface.openapi.yaml` exits 0
- [ ] `financial-summary` test: asserts FinancialValue shape on all three currency fields
- [ ] `modal-data` tests assert FinancialValue shape on both RPC-enabled and legacy execution paths
- [ ] `modal-data` tests assert open, closed, and unavailable lifecycle completeness mapping
- [ ] Compliance isolation test asserts compliance-class fields emit `type: 'compliance'` and are not labeled or treated as `actual`
- [ ] No `as any` in test helpers

---

## Definition of Done

PRD-080 is **Done** when all of the following are true:

**Field closure (12 fields)**
- [ ] `VisitFinancialSummaryDTO.total_in/total_out/net_amount` are `FinancialValue` (`type: 'actual'`, `source: 'PFT'`)
- [ ] `FinancialSectionDTO.totalCashIn/totalCashOut/netPosition` are `FinancialValue` (modal-data BFF sets completeness contextually)
- [ ] `MtlEntryDTO.amount` is `FinancialValue` (`type: 'compliance'`, `source: 'mtl_entry'`, completeness: `'complete'`)
- [ ] `MtlGamingDaySummaryDTO.total_in/total_out/total_volume` are `FinancialValue` (`type: 'compliance'`, `source: 'mtl_entry'`, completeness: `'unknown'`)
- [ ] `MtlGamingDaySummaryDTO.max_single_in/max_single_out` are `FinancialValue | null`

**Consumer updates**
- [ ] All named inventory callsites updated — no callsite reads a wrapped field as bare `number`
- [ ] Rating slip modal renders `type` and `completeness.status` labels; no bare `$X.XX` without authority context
- [ ] MTL UI renders `type: 'compliance'` label; no MTL monetary value in same aggregate as PFT values

**Transport and enforcement**
- [ ] `financialValueSchema.parse()` at outbound boundary for all 12 fields
- [ ] All FinancialValue emissions include `value`, `type`, `source`, and `completeness.status` in API responses and DTO serialization boundaries
- [ ] Optional logs/debug payloads modified during this slice preserve full FinancialValue structure if emitted
- [ ] No partial FinancialValue objects are emitted at any boundary
- [ ] OpenAPI path entries updated for both routes
- [ ] Route-boundary tests assert `FinancialValue` shape on both routes
- [ ] Modal-data tests assert both RPC-enabled and legacy execution paths emit FinancialValue, not bare numbers
- [ ] Compliance isolation test asserts compliance-class fields emit `type: 'compliance'` and are not labeled or treated as `actual`

**Build gates**
- [ ] `npm run type-check` exit 0
- [ ] `npm run lint` exit 0
- [ ] `npm run build` exit 0
- [ ] No `as any` in any modified file

**Tracker and Wave 2 gate**
- [ ] `ROLLOUT-TRACKER.json` updated: 12 fields closed, `cursor.next_action` at Wave 2
- [ ] Wave 2 roadmap may now be drafted
